test.name: marble_decision_scenario_scaling
test.objective: Compare Marble live-scenario fanout, rules-per-scenario, and rule-complexity scaling.

test.name: marble_decision_scenario_scaling
test.objective: Measure Marble performance as live scenarios and rules per scenario scale.
test.load_model: Closed loop: each VU sends a new request immediately after its previous request completes.
test.sustainability_definition: 0% errors, 0% timeouts, and 0 skipped decisions during measured run.
